translation.en: She is very straightforward in every situation.

content.sentence: Cô ấy rất ___ trong mọi tình huống.

notes_md:
**Thẳng thắn** means honest and direct — you say what you really think, without hiding or sugarcoating it. It can be positive (clear, sincere) or slightly harsh depending on tone.

It describes a person or the way someone speaks. Often used with verbs like *nói*, *trả lời*, *chia sẻ*.


Close synonym: **thành thật** (more about truthfulness, softer feeling). Opposite idea: **vòng vo** (beating around the bush).

translation.en: He speaks very straightforwardly with us.

content.sentence: Ông ấy nói rất ___ với chúng tôi.

exampleSentences: Anh ấy luôn thẳng thắn chia sẻ ý kiến của mình trong các cuộc họp.
Chị nghĩ nên thẳng thắn nói ra cảm xúc để mọi người hiểu nhau hơn.
Em thích làm việc với những người thẳng thắn vì mọi chuyện rõ ràng hơn.

definitions.vi: Thành thật và trực tiếp trong lời nói hoặc hành vi.
definitions.en: Honest and direct in speech or behavior.
definitions.es: Honesta y directa en el habla o comportamiento.

example.en: She is always straightforward in giving her opinions.
example.es: Ella siempre es directa al dar sus opiniones.
example.vi: Cô ấy luôn thẳng thắn trong việc đưa ra ý kiến.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He is always honest and direct when sharing his opinions in meetings.
I think we should be honest and direct about our feelings so everyone understands each other better.
I like working with people who are honest and direct because everything is clearer.
notes:
Thẳng thắn means honest and direct — you say what you really think, without hiding or sugarcoating it. It can be positive (clear, sincere) or slightly harsh depending on tone.

It describes a person or the way someone speaks. Often used with verbs like nói, trả lời, chia sẻ.

Close synonym: thành thật (more about truthfulness, softer feeling). Opposite idea: vòng vo (beating around the bush).
